syntax.content: public static class ResultMapHttpExtensions

symbols.name: RegisterErrorHandler(Func)
symbols.summary: Registers a custom error handler for a specific error type.
symbols.remarks: If a handler is already registered for the error type, it will be replaced (last registration wins). This handler will be invoked before the default error handling logic when the Result contains an error of type TError.

syntax.content: public static void RegisterErrorHandler(Func handler) where TError : IResultError

parameters.description: A function that takes a logger and result and returns an IResult.
A function that takes a logger and result and returns an IResult.

symbols.name: RemoveErrorHandler()
symbols.summary: Removes a custom error handler for a specific error type.

syntax.content: public static bool RemoveErrorHandler() where TError : IResultError

returns.description: true if the handler was removed; otherwise, false.
true if the handler was removed; otherwise, false.

symbols.name: ClearErrorHandlers()
symbols.summary: Clears all registered custom error handlers.

syntax.content: public static void ClearErrorHandlers()

symbols.name: HasErrorHandlerFor()
symbols.summary: Checks if a custom handler is registered for the specified error type.

syntax.content: public static bool HasErrorHandlerFor() where TError : IResultError

returns.description: true if a handler is registered for the specified error type; otherwise, false.
true if a handler is registered for the specified error type; otherwise, false.

symbols.name: GetRegisteredErrorTypes()
symbols.summary: Gets a list of all error types with registered handlers.

syntax.content: public static IEnumerable GetRegisteredErrorTypes()

returns.description: An enumerable of all registered error types.
An enumerable of all registered error types.

symbols.name: Map(Result, Func, ILogger)
symbols.summary: Maps a generic BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 struct to HTTP results for operations, handling success, unauthorized, not found, bad request, validation, conflict, rule violations, and other error cases in a flexible manner.

syntax.content: public static Results Map(Result result, Func successFunc, ILogger logger = null) where TSuccess : IResult where TNotFound : IResult where TUnauthorized : IResult where TBadRequest : IResult where TProblem : IResult where TValue : class

parameters.description: The BridgingIT.DevKit.Common.Result%601 struct containing the operation outcome.
A function to generate the success HTTP result when the operation succeeds. Must return TSuccess.
An optional logger for logging failure cases. If null, no logging occurs.

returns.description: A Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResults.Results%605 representing the HTTP response.
